name: smartsheet-cowork
description: Read, write, share, and create Smartsheet sheets via the REST API using a personal access token. Works regardless of your account plan as long as the token comes from a paid account.
long_description: A local MCP server that wraps the Smartsheet REST v2 API. Unlike the official Smartsheet MCP at mcp.smartsheet.com (which requires Business/Enterprise/AWM on the calling account), this bundle just needs a personal access token from any paid account. v1.0 covers reading, writing, deleting, searching, sharing (with view/edit access levels), creating/copying/deleting sheets, editing columns, exporting to xlsx/csv, plus an auth-check 'whoami'. The token is stored in the OS keychain.

smartsheet_api_token.title: Smartsheet API token
smartsheet_api_token.description: Personal access token generated from a Smartsheet Business/Enterprise/AWM account (Account → Personal Settings → API Access → Generate new access token).

smartsheet_api_base.title: API base URL
smartsheet_api_base.description: Leave as the default unless using Smartsheet Regions (EU: https://api.smartsheet.eu/2.0, Gov: https://api.smartsheetgov.com/2.0).

smartsheet_export_dir.title: Sheet export folder
smartsheet_export_dir.description: Where `export_sheet` saves downloaded .xlsx / .csv files. Defaults to ~/smartsheet-exports/. Use an absolute path.

tools.name: whoami
tools.description: Return who the PAT belongs to. Cheap auth-check.

tools.name: list_sheets
tools.description: List all sheets accessible to the token holder.

tools.name: get_sheet
tools.description: Get a sheet's columns and rows by sheet ID.

tools.name: get_columns
tools.description: Get a sheet's column definitions (column IDs, types, titles).

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search across all accessible Smartsheet content.

tools.name: list_workspaces
tools.description: List workspaces accessible to the token holder.

tools.name: get_workspace
tools.description: Get a workspace's contents (folders, sheets, reports, dashboards).

tools.name: list_personal_folder
tools.description: List sheets and folders in the user's personal Home folder.

tools.name: add_rows
tools.description: Append one or more rows to a sheet.

tools.name: update_rows
tools.description: Update cells in existing rows by row ID.

tools.name: delete_rows
tools.description: Delete one or more rows by row ID.

tools.name: list_shares
tools.description: List who a sheet is shared with and their access levels.

tools.name: share_sheet
tools.description: Share a sheet with a user or group at a given access level (VIEWER/EDITOR/EDITOR_SHARE/ADMIN/OWNER).

tools.name: update_share
tools.description: Change someone's access level on a shared sheet (e.g., promote viewer to editor).

tools.name: unshare
tools.description: Revoke a user's or group's access to a sheet.

tools.name: create_sheet
tools.description: Create a new sheet (blank or with specified columns).

tools.name: delete_sheet
tools.description: Delete a sheet by ID (destructive).

tools.name: copy_sheet
tools.description: Copy an existing sheet to a folder, workspace, or home.

tools.name: add_columns
tools.description: Add columns to an existing sheet.

tools.name: update_columns
tools.description: Update a column's title, type, or picklist options.

tools.name: delete_columns
tools.description: Delete a column from a sheet (destructive).

tools.name: export_sheet
tools.description: Download a sheet as Excel (.xlsx) or CSV, saved to disk.
